name: Premium Trial — NPS survey (automated)
subject: How's your Premium trial going?
preheader: One quick tap — how likely are you to recommend Glowforge Premium?
note: NPS survey. 0-10 buttons link to landing page /premium-nps?nps_score=N (HubSpot form GUID cac5e501-5d25-4433-8a13-5722fbb95502, prefills hidden nps_score, asks open-ended nps_reason). Writes nps_score/nps_reason to contact -> warehouse. Place near end of trial (~day 12).
